ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular season, playoffs, friendly) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather during the match */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the team was playing at home or away */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height in cm */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight in kg */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appearance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the appearance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the player appeared */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the match */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Minute the player started playing */,
  "substitution_time" INTEGER /* Minute the player was substituted, if applicable */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_appearances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_appearances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored the goal */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the goal was scored */,
  "goal_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the goal was scored (in minutes) */,
  "assist_by" INTEGER /* Player ID of the player who assisted the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_assist_by FOREIGN KEY ("assist_by") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the disciplinary action */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the disciplinary action was taken */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of disciplinary action (e.g., yellow card, red card) */,
  "minute_received" INTEGER /* Minute the card was received */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disciplinary action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_records_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_seasons" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
